name: Community Hub
description: That's us. The independent, community-driven home for learning, building, and testing OGraf.

items.name: ograf.dev
items.desc: This site. Tutorials, ecosystem map, spec history, migration guides, plus in-browser tools (Package Checker today, more coming) under /tools.

name: Official
description: The spec itself and its authoritative source of truth.

items.name: OGraf Specification
items.desc: The EBU OGraf open graphics standard. Graphics Definition v1 is stable. Server/Control API is in draft.

items.name: OGraf GitHub
items.desc: Official specification repository with JSON schemas, examples, and documentation.

name: Editors
description: Build graphics — no-code authoring tools or developer-facing editors.

items.name: Loopic
items.desc: No-code browser-based TV graphics template builder with one-click OGraf export.

items.name: DJ HTML Creator
items.desc: Windows desktop motion graphics app with timeline editor. Exports as OGraf Web Component.

items.name: Eyevinn ograf-editor
items.desc: Web-based visual template editor with drag-and-drop, Monaco code editor, and animation system.

items.name: Ferryman
items.desc: Convert After Effects / Lottie JSON animations into HTML broadcast templates for CasparCG, SPX, and OGraf.

name: Controllers
description: Drive graphics live from a control surface or operator UI.

items.name: SPX-GC
items.desc: Professional browser-based graphics controller for live productions. CasparCG, OBS, vMix support. OGraf compliance in v1.4.

items.name: SuperConductor
items.desc: Cross-platform playout client controlling CasparCG, ATEM, OBS, vMix, and HTTP devices.

name: Renderers & Servers
description: Render graphics to output — SDI, NDI, browser canvas, or cloud pipeline.

items.name: CasparCG
items.desc: Open-source professional graphics and video playout server. SDI/NDI output. OGraf via HTML producer.

items.name: ograf-server
items.desc: Reference OGraf renderer with upload API, control API, and browser-based rendering.

items.name: SPX Graphics Server
items.desc: Dedicated commercial server with full OGraf + SPX template support and ServerAPI for automated playout.

name: Developer Tools
description: Validate, inspect, test, and generate OGraf assets while you build.

items.name: ograf-form
items.desc: Web Component that auto-generates input forms from OGraf/GDD schemas.

name: Templates & Examples
description: Starter templates and reference implementations you can learn from or fork.

items.name: ograf-graphics
items.desc: Open-source collection of OGraf graphics templates.

name: Community & Docs
description: Docs, forums, and everything else worth reading.

items.name: StreamShapers Docs
items.desc: Documentation covering OGraf, CasparCG, SPX, and After Effects workflows.

items.name: CasparCG Forum
items.desc: Active community forum with OGraf discussion threads.

name: Consulting
description: Hire someone to accelerate your OGraf rollout.

items.name: Xperity
items.desc: OGraf adoption consulting with the Xperity Synthesis Framework for migration and integration.
